chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI Cr. B.A. No.737 of 2025 (Muhammad Mehmood @ Sanata vs. The State) ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Date Order with Signature(s) of Judge(s) For hg. of bail application 26.05.2025 Mr. Muhammad Lateefuddin Pasha advocate for applicant Mr. Ch. Mehmood Anwar, Special Prosecutor Rangers (Sindh) Ms. Amna Ansari, Addl: PG Sindh ORDER ----- Muhammad Iqbal Kalhoro, J: After arguing the matter at some length, learned counsel for the applicant has submitted that he would be satisfied and does not press this bail application, if the applicant is allowed to file s fresh bail application before the trial Court, which shall reconsider merits as well as ground of delay in this case. As the applicant is in jail since 2018 for no fault of him and the prosecution has not been able to conclude the case and recently due to arrest of co-accused Junaid @ Bulldog, denovo, trial has been ordered. This proposal has not been opposed by the learned Special Prosecutor Rangers (Sindh) and learned Addl: PG Sindh. Accordingly, this bail application is dismissed as not pressed, however, the trial Court is directed to consider all the above facts and grounds including ground of delay and the fact that denovo trial has been ordered to be held, which is likely to cause further delay in the conclusion of trial and pass an speaking order within a period of 15 days after filing of application. This Criminal Bail Application is disposed of above in above terms. JUDGE JUDGE Rafiq/PA.
